sections.sectionTitle: A Kiima om Minam Dangte tungah Thukhenna

verses.text: Topa' thugenna: Hadrak gammite' gimtuahna ding Topa in thu khenzo a, Damaskas khuapi in zong tuak ding hi. Israel minam khempeuh, Topa-a' ahih mah bangin leitung minam khempeuh zong Topa-a' mah ahi hi
Hadrak tawh a kigizawng Hamath zong, Topa-a' mah hi a, siamna a nei Taia khuapi leh Sidon khuapite zong, ama-a' mah ahi hi
Taia khuapi in galnan'na kulh bawl a, leivui zahin ngun leh kham hau a, kongzing nin zahin kiciang venvan hi
Ahi zongin Topa in a neih khempeuh laksakin tuipi sungah paihsak ding a, a khuapi a haltumsak ding hi

Ashkelon khuapi in hih thu mu-in lau ding a, Gaza khuapi in zong gimlawh ding hi. A lametna teng bei ding ahih manin Ekron khuapi in zong gimlawh ding hi. Gaza khuapi in a kumpipa taan ding a, Ashkelon khuapi kinusiacip ding hi
Ashdod khuapi-ah minam dangte zong teng ding a, a kiphasak Filistia mite ka beisak ding hi

Amaute in sa, a si tawh ne nawnlo ding uh a, a kikham ante zong tang ding uh hi. A suakta sunteng, keima mite suak ding uh a, Judah mite lakah beh khat bang ding uh hi. Jebus mite mah bangin Ekron khua mite zong keima mi suak ding uh hi
Tua ciangin ka gamsung ka hu ding a, galte ka nawksak nawn kei ding hi. Ka mihingte' thuakna mu khin ka hih manin migilote, ka bawlsiasak nawn kei ding hi.

Zion mite aw, nakpi takin lungdam un. Jerusalem mite aw, lungdamin awng un. En un, na kumpipa uh hong pai hi. Amah, gualzawhna tawh hong pai hi. Ahi zongin kiniamkhiatna tawh hong pai a, sin nailoh lano tungah hong tuang hi

Galkidona leengte Israel gam pan beisakin, sakol galkapte, Judah gam pan ka lakhia ding a, galdona-a kizang thalte kisusia ding hi. Na kumpipa un minam dangte lakah kilemna thu gen ding a, amah in tuipi mong khat pan tuipi mong khat dong, Eufratis Gunpi panin leimong dongin a uk ding hi.
Sisan tawh a kikipsak, note tawh ka thuciamna hangin na salsuahna uh keugaw gam panin note ka hong suaktasak ding hi
Lametna a om no salte aw, ciahkik un la, a muan'huai mahmah na mun ngei uh zuankik un. Note' thuaknasa a zah nihin thupha ka hong piakna ding tuni-in note kiangah ka hong gen hi
Grik mite, simna dingin Judah, thal bangin keekin, Israel thaltangin ka zang ding a, Zion mite, namsau-in ka zang ding hi
Ama mite tungah Topa kilang ding a, a thaltang lotte khuaphia bang ding hi. Topa Pasian in peengkul tum ding a, leitaw lam panin a hong pai huihpi tawh a va kuankhia ding hi

Vanglian Topa in ama mite hu ding a, ama mite in a galte uh susia ding hi. Galdona sungah zukham bangin awng gawp ding uh a, a galte uh' sisan luangsakgawp ding uh hi. Biakna site, biakna tau tungah hai-a sun tawh kibangin a luangsak ding uh hi

Tuucingpa in a tuuhonte lauhuaina panin a hotkhiat bangin, tua ni ciangin Topa, amau' Pasian in a mite a honkhia ding hi. Kumpi lukhu tungah a om suangmanphate bangin ama gamsungah a mite taang ding uh hi
Tua thu bangzah takin hoihin nuam ding ahi hiam? Anlim nekna in tangvalte thahatsak ding a, zulim nekna in nungakte thadimsak ding hi.
